mapper.select: SELECT as2.id, as2.agent_id, as2.skill_id, as2.enabled, as2.is_primary, as2.sort_order, as2.created_at, s.name AS skill_name, s.code AS skill_code FROM ai_agent_skill as2 LEFT JOIN ai_skill s ON as2.skill_id = s.id WHERE as2.agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY as2.sort_order ASC, as2.created_at ASC

SELECT as2.id, as2.agent_id, as2.skill_id, as2.enabled, as2.is_primary, as2.sort_order, as2.created_at, s.name AS skill_name, s.code AS skill_code FROM ai_agent_skill as2 LEFT JOIN ai_skill s ON as2.skill_id = s.id WHERE as2.id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_agent_skill WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND skill_id = #{skillId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_agent_skill (agent_id, skill_id, enabled, is_primary, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{skillId}, #{enabled}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder}, NOW())
